title: Tunisian Stir Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful stir fry dish inspired by Tunisian cuisine. Quick and easy to make, this recipe combines the perfect balance of spices and savory flavors.

ingredients.name: Stir-fry veggies
ingredients.notes: your choice (e.g. bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced tomato and spicy peppers; cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add the stir-fry veggies and cook until they start to soften.
Sprinkle the Tunisian spice blend over the mixture and stir to combine.
If desired, stir in the silky tahini.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
